package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	grpc "google.golang.org/grpc"
)

// scenario for grpc_dial_per_request: `grpc.Dial(addr, opts...)` or `grpc.NewClient(addr, opts...)` inside handler functions
// fixture polarity: positive; family: library; severity: warning.
func scenario411Positive(ctx context.Context, addr string) (*grpc.ClientConn, error) {
	_ = context.Background()
	return grpc.Dial(addr)
}
